# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-admin-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: user-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-metrics-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: user-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 9091
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1

---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: order-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8082
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-grpc-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: order-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 50051
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---

  name: payment-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8083
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---

kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 8084
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 8085
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: notification-service-grpc-server
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: notification-service
  port: 50052
  proxyProtocol: gRPC

---
# ServerAuthorization: Only ingress controller can reach the API gateway
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-ingress-to-api-gateway
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-nginx-sa
          namespace: ingress-nginx

---
# ServerAuthorization: API gateway admin port accessible only by monitoring
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-monitoring-to-api-gateway-admin
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: api-gateway-admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus-sa
          namespace: monitoring

---
# ServerAuthorization: API gateway -> user-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-user-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway-sa
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: order-service -> user-service (for user validation)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-order-service-to-user-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Prometheus -> user-service metrics
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-prometheus-to-user-service-metrics
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: user-service-metrics-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus-sa
          namespace: monitoring

---
# ServerAuthorization: API gateway -> order-service (HTTP)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-order-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway-sa
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: notification-service -> order-service (gRPC for order status callbacks)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-notification-to-order-service-grpc
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-grpc-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: notification-service-sa
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: inventory-service -> order-service (gRPC for stock reservations)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-inventory-to-order-service-grpc
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: order-service-grpc-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: inventory-service-sa
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: Only order-service can reach payment-service
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-order-service-to-payment-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: payment-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: order-service -> inventory-service (stock checks)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-order-service-to-inventory-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: API gateway -> inventory-service (product availability)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-api-gateway-to-inventory-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: inventory-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: api-gateway-sa
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: order-service and payment-service -> notification-service (HTTP)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-order-payment-to-notification-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: production
        - name: payment-service-sa
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: user-service -> notification-service (gRPC for welcome emails, password resets)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-user-service-to-notification-grpc
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-grpc-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: user-service-sa
          namespace: production

---
# ServerAuthorization: order-service -> notification-service (gRPC for order confirmations)
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-order-service-to-notification-grpc
  namespace: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
spec:
  server:
    name: notification-service-grpc-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: order-service-sa
          namespace: production

---
# ServiceAccounts referenced by the authorization policies
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    mesh: zero-trust

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: user-service
    mesh: zero-trust

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: order-service
    mesh: zero-trust

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: payment-service
    mesh: zero-trust

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: inventory-service
    mesh: zero-trust

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: notification-service-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: notification-service
    mesh: zero-trust

---
# Default deny-all: Linkerd's default policy can be set to deny
# via the config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy annotation on namespace
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
  labels:
    mesh: zero-trust
  annotations:
    config.linkerd.io/default-inbound-policy: deny
